pactMagic.note: All Pact Magic slots are always cast at the highest available slot level.

classDescription: A spellcaster bound to a powerful otherworldly patron.
roleIdentity: Short-rest caster with high-impact invocations and at-will tricks.

warlock-eldritch-patron-subclass.summary: Your patron decides the flavor of your power, the bargains you carry, and the special tools that distinguish your pact from any other.
warlock-eldritch-patron-subclass.description: Eldritch Patron is the subclass gate for warlock. It should immediately make the class feel specific: fey manipulation, fiendish bargains, or cosmic mind pressure instead of a generic arcane shell.

warlock-pact-magic.summary: You work with very few slots, but every one lands at maximum pact strength and refreshes faster than normal spellcasting.
warlock-pact-magic.description:
Pact Magic is what makes warlock feel different from every other caster. Your slots are limited, but they always hit at the highest pact level and come back on a Short Rest.

In play, this should encourage bold casting, not timid hoarding, because your recovery cadence is part of the class fantasy.
warlock-pact-magic.recovery: Pact Magic slots refresh on a Short Rest.

warlock-eldritch-blast.summary: Your signature ranged cantrip gives the class a dependable, scaling combat baseline even when slots are gone.
warlock-eldritch-blast.description: Eldritch Blast is a major part of warlock identity. It is the at-will pressure engine that lets the class stay threatening between pact-slot casts and combine strongly with invocations.

warlock-eldritch-invocations-2.summary: Choose supernatural upgrades that personalize your pact and reshape how your at-will toolkit actually plays.
warlock-eldritch-invocations-2.description: Eldritch Invocations are one of the reasons warlock feels uniquely customizable. They alter combat lines, utility options, senses, disguises, and spell pressure in ways other casters do not.

choices.name: Agonizing Blast
choices.description: Add Charisma to Eldritch Blast damage to sharpen your at-will pressure.

choices.name: Repelling Blast
choices.description: Push targets with Eldritch Blast to create forced movement and control.

choices.name: Eldritch Spear
choices.description: Extend Eldritch Blast range for safer long-lane pressure.

choices.name: Devil's Sight
choices.description: See through darkness, including magical darkness, for tactical advantage.

choices.name: Mask of Many Faces
choices.description: Gain at-will disguise utility for social and infiltration play.

warlock-magical-cunning.summary: You can recover momentum faster than most casters, reinforcing the warlock's short-rest rhythm.
warlock-magical-cunning.description: Magical Cunning supports the warlock pacing model by helping you regain meaningful magical fuel between major encounters.

warlock-pact-boon.summary: Your boon defines the form your bargain takes in daily play: weapon, tome, familiar, or another pact expression.
warlock-pact-boon.description: Pact Boon is where the class becomes deeply personal. This choice should shift what the player looks for in combat, exploration, and spell usage and should be surfaced clearly in the sheet.

choices.name: Pact of the Blade
choices.description: Lean into weapon pressure and melee invocations like Thirsting Blade.

choices.name: Pact of the Tome
choices.description: Expand cantrip and ritual-like utility through a broader magical toolkit.

choices.name: Pact of the Chain
choices.description: Gain a stronger familiar identity for scouting, utility, and setup.

warlock-mystic-arcanum-6th.summary: Your patron grants a higher-tier spell effect outside the normal pact-slot loop, marking a major jump in magical reach.
warlock-mystic-arcanum-6th.description: Mystic Arcanum represents access to special top-end magic that is not meant to feel like ordinary slot casting. It should be presented as a memorable once-per-day style reward rather than blended into normal pact slots.

choices.name: Mass Suggestion Arcanum
choices.description: Take social-control dominance for large encounters and intrigue scenes.

choices.name: Circle of Death Arcanum
choices.description: Take heavy area damage pressure for packed enemy formations.

choices.name: True Seeing Arcanum
choices.description: Take high-value perception and anti-deception utility.

warlock-cantrips-known-3.summary: Your at-will toolkit expands, making your no-slot turns more flexible and expressive.
warlock-cantrips-known-3.description: Extra cantrips matter more on warlock than on many classes because the class often leans on at-will pressure and utility between pact-slot spikes.

warlock-pact-slot-level-3.summary: Your pact slots jump in raw power, so every spell you cast with them now lands at a stronger tier.
warlock-pact-slot-level-3.description: Because all pact slots cast at the same maximum level, each slot-level increase is a meaningful warlock power spike rather than a bookkeeping footnote.

warlock-contact-patron.summary: Your bond with the patron deepens into a more direct line of influence and support.
warlock-contact-patron.description: At higher levels, the class fantasy leans harder into active relationship with the patron rather than vague background flavor. This kind of feature should read like a real escalation in that bond.

warlock-hex-master.summary: Your signature curse magic reaches an endgame state where maintaining pressure feels effortless.
warlock-hex-master.description: Hex Master is capstone-style warlock pressure. It supports the fantasy of an inexhaustible cursed duelist or blaster who can keep a target under supernatural pressure all fight long.

warlock-eldritch-master.summary: At the top end of the class, recovering pact fuel becomes even more reliable and reinforces your relentless cadence.
warlock-eldritch-master.description: Eldritch Master is about endgame tempo. It should make the warlock feel as though running dry is only temporary and that the pact remains an engine of sustained pressure.

warlock-asi-or-feat.summary: Sharpen your core stats or claim a feat that reinforces your pact identity.
warlock-asi-or-feat.description: Warlock ASI levels are where you lock in your long-term game plan: stronger Charisma pressure, tougher concentration, or a feat that supports your pact rhythm.

warlock-patron-feature-6.summary: Your patron grants a level 6 signature escalation.
warlock-patron-feature-6.description: At level 6, your subclass adds a concrete new pressure tool that should feel different for Fiend, Archfey, and Great Old One warlocks.

warlock-patron-feature-10.summary: Your patron package deepens with another major subclass feature.
warlock-patron-feature-10.description: At level 10, your patron identity should become easier to feel in live play through stronger survivability, control, or psychic weirdness depending on your subclass.

warlock-patron-feature-14.summary: Your patron grants a high-impact signature capstone move.
warlock-patron-feature-14.description: At level 14, subclass identity should feel unmistakable: nightmare punishment, fey mind-prisons, or long-term enthrallment.

warlock-patron-feature-18.summary: Your patron path reaches its final expression with endgame reliability.
warlock-patron-feature-18.description: This level cements your patron role in late-campaign play and should remain visible in both feature and action surfaces.

warlock-mystic-arcanum-7th.summary: Gain a 7th-level Mystic Arcanum, separate from your pact-slot pool.
warlock-mystic-arcanum-7th.description: This Arcanum is premium magic outside ordinary pact slots. Keep it mentally separate from short-rest pact-slot budgeting.

choices.name: Forcecage Arcanum
choices.description: Lock key enemies out of the fight with no concentration drop from your pact slot economy.

choices.name: Plane Shift Arcanum
choices.description: Use high-tier banishment and travel utility without spending pact slots.

choices.name: Finger of Death Arcanum
choices.description: Pick a lethal single-target finisher for boss pressure.

warlock-mystic-arcanum-8th.summary: Gain an 8th-level Mystic Arcanum as a separate high-tier cast lane.
warlock-mystic-arcanum-8th.description: Mystic Arcanum remains distinct from pact slots: this is premium top-end magic, not part of your short-rest slot loop.

choices.name: Power Word Stun Arcanum
choices.description: Take a control-first arcanum that creates hard momentum swings.

choices.name: Demiplane Arcanum
choices.description: Add utility and containment options for campaign-scale problems.

choices.name: Feeblemind Arcanum
choices.description: Pick devastating anti-caster mind-break pressure.

warlock-mystic-arcanum-9th.summary: Gain a 9th-level Mystic Arcanum, your highest non-slot magical expression.
warlock-mystic-arcanum-9th.description: This is your top-end arcanum lane and should be treated separately from pact slots in both planning and sheet clarity.

choices.name: Foresight Arcanum
choices.description: Choose elite all-day reliability for yourself or a key ally.

choices.name: True Polymorph Arcanum
choices.description: Choose a reality-warping transformation tool for major scenes.

choices.name: Psychic Scream Arcanum
choices.description: Choose battlefield-wide psychic devastation and disruption.

warlock-mystic-arcanum-improvement.summary: One of your Mystic Arcanum options improves in reliability or impact.
warlock-mystic-arcanum-improvement.description: Arcanum improvements are meaningful power jumps and should change how you plan major encounters around your premium spells.

warlock-cantrips-known-4.summary: Your at-will package expands to four cantrips.
warlock-cantrips-known-4.description: Warlocks live on at-will pressure between pact-slot spikes, so this expansion should immediately feel useful in live combat loops.

warlock-pact-slot-level-5.summary: All pact slots now cast at level 5, maximizing each slot spend.
warlock-pact-slot-level-5.description: Because every pact slot casts at the same highest tier, this jump significantly boosts every slot spell you cast.

warlock-pact-slots-4.summary: You now hold four pact slots between short rests.
warlock-pact-slots-4.description: This increases your short-rest casting endurance while preserving the warlock identity of few but high-impact slots.

warlock-epic-boon.summary: Claim an epic boon to capstone your warlock progression.
warlock-epic-boon.description: Epic boons represent late-game specialization and should reinforce your patron and invocation identity rather than dilute it.

warlock-eldritch-invocation-choice-l3.summary: Choose one additional Eldritch Invocation at level 3.
warlock-eldritch-invocation-choice-l3.description: Each additional invocation should reinforce a clear warlock plan: blast pressure, pact utility, survivability, or battlefield control.

choices.name: Agonizing Blast
choices.description: Boost Eldritch Blast damage with Charisma.

choices.name: Repelling Blast
choices.description: Add push control to Eldritch Blast hits.

choices.name: Eldritch Spear
choices.description: Increase Eldritch Blast range.

choices.name: Thirsting Blade
choices.description: Blade boon synergy: pressure with additional weapon attacks.

choices.name: Lifedrinker
choices.description: High-level blade boon finisher for weapon attacks.

warlock-eldritch-invocation-choice-l5.summary: Choose one additional Eldritch Invocation at level 5.
warlock-eldritch-invocation-choice-l5.description: Each additional invocation should reinforce a clear warlock plan: blast pressure, pact utility, survivability, or battlefield control.

progressionSummary.summary: Eldritch Patron (Subclass), Pact Magic, Eldritch Blast.

buildTips.primaryReason: powers your spells and Eldritch Blast accuracy
buildTips.secondaryReason: improves durability and Concentration on control spells
buildTips.avoidDumpReason: you still need AC and initiative to stay safe at range
